description:
## What it does

GoPlus Security API over x402: scan token contracts and wallet addresses for risks — honeypots, buy/sell tax, mintable/blacklist/proxy permissions and known malicious addresses — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Pre-trade safety screening before a swap.
- Wallet / address risk checks before transfers or approvals.
- Automated due-diligence inside agent trading flows.

## Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — Malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam)
- `GET /api/v1/approval_security/{chain_id}` — Approval / allowance risk check for a spender contract

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet (`exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

BSC Mainnet (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}'
```

Pay on BSC Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

endpoints.description: Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
Approval / allowance risk check for a spender contract

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

GoPlus 安全 API 的 x402 网关:扫描代币合约与钱包地址风险——貔貅、买卖税、增发/黑名单/代理权限以及已知恶意地址,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 兑换前的安全筛查。
- 转账或授权前的地址风险检查。
- Agent 交易流中的自动尽调。

## 接口

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — 代币安全报告(貔貅、买卖税、所有者权限、持币分布),支持单/多合约
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — 恶意地址检测(制裁、钓鱼、已知诈骗)
- `GET /api/v1/approval_security/{chain_id}` — 授权/额度风险检测(针对 spender 合约)

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网(`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

BSC 主网(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BSC 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001
```

title: GoPlus
use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
